name: liver MRI — LR-5 with negation conflict and orphan measurement

report.technique: Multiphase liver MRI with extracellular gadolinium contrast.
report.findings: Cirrhotic liver. No arterially hyperenhancing observation in segment 5. Patent portal vein.
report.impression: 1. New 18 mm arterially hyperenhancing observation in segment 5 with washout, LR-5.
